title: Overview / Download of all files in a workspace

posts.author: TFaust (Timo Faust)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

Background:
I manage a couple of workspaces on the company account where each workspace is a client project containing a number of boards, docs and forms.
It is quite alright to track all the files posted on the individual workboards via the “file gallery view” and I like that I can easily download a .zip file of them.

Current situation:
When I complete a project, I pull the account details from administrative board and filter the Excel files by project name so that I can easily give them to the client as additional documentation.

Request:
I also want to be able to easily download all the files from a workspace.
Including: Files from boards, files posted in updates/communication and files such as PDFs that are stored in docs.

Is there an easy way to download all these files for a project/workspace at once? Like a file manager that shows all the files in a workspace?
The account_data assets folder is not really helpful when you are working on multiple projects & internal boards and not every file is perfectly named.

Any ideas? Have I missed a simple way or feature? If not, what is the easiest way to achieve this or are there any features planned for the future?

Thanks again in advance, I know you guys are already one step ahead of me and I appreciate any feedback from this great community. As English is not my first language, please feel free to ask me to clarify my thoughts.

Kind regards
Timo

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Timo,

You raise a good point and question!

At this stage, it isn’t currently possible to bulk download all files within a workspace, without exporting the entire accounts data. You can learn more about the process here → How to export your entire account’s data.

I understand that this may not be the most ideal route forward as you’re looking to export individual workspaces, however for the time being, I do believe this is the best route forward. I will be sure to share this feedback with the relevant team internally for their visibility

posts.author: TFaust (Timo Faust)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

thanks for the reply.
I exported the entire account’s data, but with about 4000 files in assets it is quite hard to filter out all files relevant to one project / customer.

Thank you for forwarding my feedback to the team, right now I will just have to go through all boards manually and filter the files hidden in updates etc. Will cost quite some time.

Looking forward to future improvement in this sector.

Have a great day
Timo

posts.author: TFaust (Timo Faust)
posts.cookedHtml:
@BiancaT

Hi Bianca, is there an update available to this issue? As I finish quite a lot of projects in this quarter I thought it is the best time to check in if the solutions have been made more user friendly.

Best regards
Timo
